TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_liken, title = liken, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/liken} }

S.FORM: == liken == u zuma a kamu: nu Hulam:沙 nu Amilika:sand nu Lipun:砂
S.PHON: == r~ɾikən == u zuma a kamu: nu ħur~ɾam:* nu amir~ɾika:sand nu r~ɾipun:*

S.PHON: == r~ɾikən == u zuma a kamu: nu ħur~ɾam:* nu amir~ɾika:sand nu r~ɾipun:*
